name: Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Rundll32 - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nikita Nazarov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Rundll32 - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated Powershell via use Rundll32 in Scripts

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%&&%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%rundll32%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%shell32.dll%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%shellexec_rundll%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%value%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%invoke%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%comspec%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%iex%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Rundll32 - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%&&%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%rundll32%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%shell32.dll%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%shellexec_rundll%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%value%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%invoke%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%comspec%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%iex%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Rundll32 - Security
